choose.otherwise: AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT board_id, title, writer, read_cnt, created_at FROM board WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, writer) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer})

INSERT INTO board_file (board_id, original_name, save_name, file_size) VALUES
(#{file.boardId}, #{file.originalName}, #{file.saveName}, #{file.fileSize})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET read_cnt = read_cnt + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
